old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7","title":"Grow Zephyr simulator fidelity","description":"Build faithful enough Renode/native simulation backends for board/application combinations that the boot audit could not honestly execute. Model only behavior needed by documented target hardware and retain explicit boundaries where physical validation remains required.","acceptance_criteria":"Each declared simulator backend loads canonical firmware, reaches app-specific late runtime markers, and produces an independent protocol/radio effect; model limitations are documented and never presented as physical RF/electrical proof.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:39:22.713394Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:39:22.713394Z"}
